description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:latest Docker image. Define three stages: build, unit test, and acceptance test, and set a cache for /apt-cache and Go module directories under /go/src. In the build stage add a go_build job that runs `go build ./...` and stores the entire repository as an artifact, and a lint job that installs golangci-lint via `curl -sfL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/golangci/golangci-lint/master/install.sh| sh -s -- -b $(go env GOPATH)/bin` then runs `golangci-lint run`. In the unit test stage add a unit_test job that installs Ginkgo with `go install github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2/ginkgo@latest` and executes `ginkgo -r --randomizeAllSpecs --randomizeSuites --failOnPending --cover --trace --race --progress`, followed by `go test -coverprofile=cover.out ./...` and `go tool cover -func=cover.out`. In the acceptance test stage add an acceptance_test job that updates apt and installs python3 via `apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq python3` then runs `python3 acceptance_test.py`.
